subject: A figure in an ornate wide-brimmed hat leans over a table scattered with playing cards, holding a small blade in one hand and a glass of red liquid on the table nearby, red magical energy swirling around
description: A close-up portrait scene of a humanoid figure in a large ornate wide-brimmed hat and dark armored attire. The figure leans forward over a table covered with playing cards arranged in several groups. One hand holds a small curved blade; the other rests on the table surface. A glass containing red liquid sits to the right. Red magical energy in swirling ribbon-form curls around the figure's hand and blade. The figure's expression is calculating and composed, looking slightly off-center. Warm amber and red tones dominate the scene, suggesting a saloon or gambling den interior at night or in dim light.
foreground: figure in ornate hat leaning over table of playing cards, small blade in hand, red magic swirling
background: warm dim interior, candle or lantern light suggested
emotion: cold calculation, controlled menace — leaning in, watching the hand
